title: Senior Project Manager – Construction
summary: Lead the end-to-end delivery of a large-scale construction program, coordinating design, procurement, and site execution to meet cost, schedule, and quality targets.
responsibilities: Own project delivery from mobilization through handover across cost, schedule, quality, and safety
Coordinate consultants, subcontractors, and international partners under a single program plan
Manage risk, change, and reporting for client and executive stakeholders
Ensure compliance with Saudi regulations and SATCO HSE standards
requirements: 12+ years in construction delivery, including 5+ leading large programs
Degree in Civil Engineering, Construction Management, or a related field
Track record delivering integrated communities or infrastructure at scale
PMP or equivalent; familiarity with FIDIC contracts

title: Facilities Management Engineer
summary: Support the operation and maintenance of complex assets, ensuring uptime, safety, and long-term performance across facilities management contracts.
responsibilities: Plan and supervise preventive and corrective maintenance programs
Monitor asset performance and coordinate specialist vendors
Uphold HSE and quality standards across sites
Support mobilization of new O&M mandates
requirements: 5+ years in facilities or asset management
Degree in Mechanical, Electrical, or Facilities Engineering
Working knowledge of CAFM systems and planned maintenance
Strong coordination and reporting skills

title: Airport Systems Technician
summary: Operate and maintain airside and terminal systems in live airport environments, keeping mission-critical equipment available around the clock.
responsibilities: Maintain PBBs, GPUs, PCA, and visual docking-guidance systems
Diagnose and resolve faults with minimal disruption to operations
Maintain accurate service and compliance records
Work within airport safety and security protocols
requirements: 3+ years maintaining airport or heavy electromechanical systems
Technical diploma in Electrical, Mechanical, or Mechatronics
Ability to work shifts in a live-airport environment
Strong fault-finding and safety discipline

title: PPP Investment Analyst
summary: Support origination and structuring of public–private partnership projects, building the financial analysis that informs investment decisions.
responsibilities: Build and maintain project-finance models for PPP opportunities
Support due diligence, risk allocation, and bid preparation
Prepare investment materials for internal and partner review
Track market and regulatory developments across the Kingdom
requirements: 3+ years in project finance, infrastructure investment, or advisory
Degree in Finance, Economics, or Engineering
Strong financial modeling and analytical skills
Interest in infrastructure and giga-project delivery

title: Site Civil Engineer
summary: Deliver civil works on site, translating designs into built infrastructure while maintaining quality, safety, and program.
responsibilities: Supervise civil and structural works on site
Coordinate subcontractors and verify quality against specifications
Track progress and support the project schedule
Enforce HSE requirements on site
requirements: 4+ years in site civil engineering
Degree in Civil Engineering
Experience with earthworks, roads, and utilities
Familiarity with QA/QC procedures

title: Baggage Systems Commissioning Engineer
summary: Commission baggage handling and terminal systems in live and greenfield environments, integrating controls, SCADA, and mechanical works through to handover.
responsibilities: Plan and execute commissioning of BHS, conveyors, and controls
Coordinate integration of SCADA, RFID, and BRS platforms
Manage testing, snagging, and handover documentation
Interface with OEMs and airport operations teams
requirements: 6+ years in baggage or materials-handling systems
Degree in Mechanical, Electrical, or Control Engineering
Hands-on commissioning and integration experience
Ability to work within live terminal constraints

title: Landscaping Operations Supervisor
summary: Supervise landscaping and irrigation operations that sustain green, livable environments across SATCO-operated sites.
responsibilities: Plan and supervise landscaping and irrigation maintenance
Manage crews, materials, and equipment
Monitor water use and plant health
Uphold safety and quality standards
requirements: 4+ years in landscaping or grounds operations
Diploma or degree in Horticulture, Agriculture, or a related field
Experience managing teams in demanding climates
Knowledge of irrigation systems

title: Contracts & Procurement Lead
summary: Lead contracts and procurement for partnership and infrastructure projects, securing value and managing supplier relationships across the lifecycle.
responsibilities: Lead tendering, negotiation, and award of major packages
Manage contracts, claims, and supplier performance
Ensure compliance with procurement policy and governance
Provide commercial input to project-financed structures
requirements: 10+ years in contracts and procurement for infrastructure
Degree in Engineering, Quantity Surveying, Law, or Business
Experience with FIDIC and project-financed contracts
Strong negotiation and stakeholder management
